_meta.purpose: BLEEDTHROUGH per-province target list: the dark IPs and open resolvers inside China that the injector-tomography prober probes. This is an EXAMPLE / SCHEMA only.
_meta.warning: Every IP below is in an RFC 5737 documentation range (192.0.2.0/24, 198.51.100.0/24, 203.0.113.0/24) and is NOT a real target. A real list is a CURATED product: run collectors.bleedthrough.curate_dark_ips (dark space, direct transport) and curate_resolvers (live open resolvers, fallback transport) against Chinese prefixes, then paste the survivors here with province + ASN. The runner refuses to probe while placeholder=true.
_meta.clean_answers: optional map domain -> legitimate IPs from a trusted control resolver; lets the resolver transport class any non-clean answer as a forgery (else it falls back to the known GFW pool only).
